mapper.select: SELECT * FROM lottery_record WHERE student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY lottery_time DESC

SELECT li.id AS itemId, li.name AS itemName, COUNT(DISTINCT lr.id) AS cnt FROM lottery_item li LEFT JOIN lottery_record lr ON (lr.item_id = li.id OR lr.item_name = li.name) AND lr.is_redeemed = 0 AND lr.student_id IN (SELECT id FROM user WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND id = #{studentId}) WHERE li.parent_id = #{parentId} GROUP BY li.id, li.name HAVING cnt > 0 ORDER BY cnt DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO lottery_record (student_id, item_id, item_name, lottery_time, is_redeemed) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{itemId}, #{itemName}, #{lotteryTime}, #{isRedeemed})
